description: Injects a response-language instruction into context on every user prompt

hooks.command: if [ -n "$ZN_RESPONSE_LANGUAGE" ]; then echo "Always respond to the user in $ZN_RESPONSE_LANGUAGE, regardless of the language of their message. Keep technical terms and code identifiers in their original form (commit, pull request, function names, flags, etc.). Maintain full orthographic correctness for $ZN_RESPONSE_LANGUAGE, including all required diacritics and special characters; never substitute them with ASCII lookalikes."; fi
